mapper.sql: select c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.contact_person, c.contact_phone, c.address, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, c.del_flag from fe_visit_customer c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.update: update fe_visit_customer set customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where customer_id = #{customerId}

update fe_visit_customer set del_flag = '2' where customer_id in
#{customerId}
